title: Septenary PASS: QA orbit connection — septenary = cosmos/satellite residues, complement = singularity
_fixture_purpose: The septenary partition {1,2,4,5,7,8} vs {0,3,6} is the QA singularity partition of mod-9: singularity fixed point (9,9)≡(0,0) mod 9 lives in the complement {0,3,6}; cosmos/satellite orbits live in {1,2,4,5,7,8}. The doubling cycle 1→2→4→8→7→5→1 is the orbit of the T² operator (Fibonacci shift squared) acting on (Z/9Z)*. Period 6 = Euler totient φ(9). Source: Iverson QA orbit structure + Grant Philomath Ch 1.

qa_connections.orbit_note: φ(9)=6 = septenary cycle period; π(9)=24 = cosmos orbit period; 24/6=4 = ratio of full orbit to unit cycle
